visuals.title: Weighted KNN Decision Process
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Weighted KNN Decision Process
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Weighted KNN and Nearest Centroid Classifier</text>
  
  <!-- Data Points -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="6" fill="#FF5722" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="120" cy="130" r="6" fill="#FF5722" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="80" cy="150" r="6" fill="#FF5722" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="150" cy="180" r="6" fill="#4CAF50" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="180" cy="160" r="6" fill="#4CAF50" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="200" cy="140" r="6" fill="#4CAF50" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  
  <!-- New Point -->
  <circle cx="140" cy="120" r="8" fill="#9C27B0" stroke="#FFF" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  
  <!-- Distance Lines -->
  <line x1="100" y1="100" x2="140" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="120" y1="130" x2="140" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="80" y1="150" x2="140" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Centroids -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="127" r="10" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#FFF" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="177" cy="160" r="10" fill="#64B5F6" stroke="#FFF" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  
  <!-- Centroid Lines -->
  <line x1="100" y1="127" x2="140" y2="120" stroke="#E91E63" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="177" y1="160" x2="140" y2="120" stroke="#E91E63" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="70" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#D84315" opacity="0">
    Class A Points
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="220" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#2E7D32" opacity="0">
    Class B Points
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="140" cy="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#7B1FA2" dy="-15" opacity="0">
    New Point
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="80" cy="127" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#0D47A1" dy="-20" opacity="0">
    Class A Centroid
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="177" cy="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" dy="-20" opacity="0">
    Class B Centroid
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="250" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Weighted KNN: Votes based on distance
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="250" y="300" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Nearest Centroid: Compare to class centers
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>

nodes.label: Calculate distances to all training points
